title: A Big Little Secret To Share...
excerpt: It's funny how something can be big and little at the same time, isn't it? Originally I was going to let you in on this secret we've been keeping last week on April 1st. You see, April 1st marked 4…
body: It's funny how something can be big and little at the same time, isn't it? Originally I was going to let you in on this secret we've been keeping last week on April 1st. You see, April 1st marked 4 years since my first date with JC. Such a special and fun day. But it's also April Fool's Day, and though it would have been funny, this big little secret isn't exactly a joke. As you can see evidenced in these photos by my dear friend Dana Colwell...!!!
